chapters.title: Friday Night Market
chapters.content: The street food market opened every Friday night. Lights, music, and the smell of grilled food filled the entire square.

chapters.title: Trying Everything
chapters.content: Leo walked from stand to stand tasting noodles, tacos, dumplings, and desserts he could not even pronounce correctly.

chapters.title: Favorite Flavor
chapters.content: In the end, his favorite was a simple spicy chicken skewer. Sometimes the best food is also the simplest.
